title: Claude Code Hooks Manifest
description: Validates plugins/*/hooks/hooks.json (only rldyour-flow and rldyour-serena-mcp may declare this file per AGENTS.md). Mirrors the canonical Claude Code hooks model: 'if' lives inside the inner hook handler (sibling to 'type'/'command'/'args'), NOT on the matcher group. Source: code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks (May 2026).

matcher.description: Optional event-specific matcher (e.g. 'Bash' for PreToolUse/PostToolUse, glob for FileChanged).

if.description: v2.1.118+. Permission rule filter such as 'Bash(git commit*)' or 'Edit(*.ts)'. Applies to tool events only; sibling to 'type' inside the handler, NOT on the matcher group.

once.description: Skill frontmatter only - runs once per session then removed. Ignored in settings.

async.description: Command hook only - run in background without blocking.

asyncRewake.description: Command hook only - run in background and wake Claude on exit code 2. Implies async.

continueOnBlock.description: v2.1.139+. PostToolUse only - feed the hook's rejection reason back to Claude and continue the turn.

command.description: Command hook: shell command (shell-form) OR executable name (exec-form when 'args' is present).

args.description: v2.1.139+. Command hook: argument list. Presence triggers exec-form (no shell tokenization). Recommended when referencing ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} or other path placeholders.

shell.description: Command hook: shell to use (default bash). Ignored when 'args' is set.

url.description: HTTP hook: URL to POST to.

allowedEnvVars.description: HTTP hook: env var names allowed for interpolation in headers.

server.description: MCP tool hook: name of configured MCP server.

tool.description: MCP tool hook: tool name on that server.

input.description: MCP tool hook: tool arguments; string values support ${path} substitution from hook input.

prompt.description: Prompt/agent hook: prompt text. Use $ARGUMENTS for hook input JSON placeholder.

model.description: Prompt/agent hook: model to evaluate with (defaults to fast model).

agent.description: Agent hook: agent name to invoke.
